Welcome back to Practical Systems. I'm joined again by Priya Neer, who spends her days keeping large systems upright. Priya, good to have you back. Good to be back, Ethan. This episode is brought to you by Datadog. Unify the observability across logs, metrics, and traces. Start at datadog.com/podcast. We opened the phones this week. Here's a question that came in from a listener out in the field. Hi Ethan, how do you tell alert fatigue from a real incident? Great question. Alert fatigue is the signal to noise problem, not a discipline problem. If the team ignores pages, the pages are wrong, not the people. So you'd tune the alerts before you tune the humans? Every time. Measure how many pages led to action under half. And you have a noise problem, no amount of willpower fixes noise. Before we wrap, thanks to the caller for that one. Priya, always a pleasure. Anytime, Ethan. That's it for Practical Systems. See you next week.
